items.title: Lenovo’s Snapdragon X2 Elite OLED Yoga Slim 7x delivers solid value even at full price, and it’s down to $1,311 today (All-time low)
items.summary: As part of its wider Black Friday in June sale event, Lenovo is offering one of its latest Yoga Slim 7x OLED Copilot+ PCs down at $1,310.99 shipped. Don’t forget to enter promo code EXTRAFIVE during checkout. This is one of the newer notebooks to hit the shelves with Qualcomm’s Snapdragon X2 Elite processor, and it typically goes for $1,700. Today’s deal, however, delivers a $389 discount on its usual going rate to mark the steepest price drop we have tracked for it to date. This particular model hit the $1,350 mark just last week, but today’s offer lands it a touch lower to hit a new all-time low. We recently spent some time with this Yoga Slim 7x model for a hands-on review and found it to be a compelling option even at full price, so the discounted price makes it an even better value for your money.

items.title: Velotric Prime Day Sale offers up to $862 savings on massive e-bike lineup starting from $999
items.summary: Velotric has launched its Prime Day Sale event running through next week and offering up to $862 savings on e-bikes, with the biggest of these packages being the T1 ST Plus Lightweight Urban e-bike with a $549 FREE bundle that includes a range extender battery – all for $1,349 shipped. The e-bike would normally fetch $1,649 at full price, with the bundled gear pushing that up to $2,198. Usually sales only offer around $149 in bundled gear and discounts to $1,399, but occasionally we get these large-scale bundles with the range extender for either $1,349 or $1,299, and very rarely $1,249 (last seen in late 2024). You’re getting the largest bundle package that we have spotted over the years for the first time since Black Friday, while the overall costs are down at the second-best of the last year and third-lowest overall. Head below to browse the full lineup of e-bike deals.
